definition: The capacity or power to do something physical or mental
example: She has the ability to learn quickly.

definition: Having the power, skill, means, or opportunity to do something
example: He was able to read at the age of three.

definition: On the subject of; concerning
example: We talked about the weather.

definition: In or to a higher position than something else
example: The sun rose above the horizon.

definition: In or to a foreign country or countries
example: She's living abroad now.

definition: The state of being away from a place or person
example: His absence was noted by the teacher.

definition: Complete; total; not mixed with anything else
example: I have absolute confidence in her ability.

definition: Completely; totally
example: You're absolutely right!

definition: To take in or soak up a substance
example: Plants absorb water through their roots.

definition: Relating to education and scholarship
example: She has excellent academic qualifications.

translations.vn: Học thuật, thuộc về giáo dục

definition: To agree to receive or take something offered
example: I accept your apology.

definition: The means or opportunity to approach or enter a place
example: Students need access to the library.

definition: An unfortunate incident that happens unexpectedly and unintentionally
example: He was injured in a car accident.

definition: To go somewhere with someone
example: I accompanied my friend to the station.

definition: To complete or achieve something successfully
example: She accomplished her goals.

definition: As stated by or in
example: According to the weather forecast, it will rain.

definition: A record or statement of financial transactions
example: I opened a bank account yesterday.

definition: Correct in all details; exact
example: The information is accurate and up to date.

definition: To successfully reach a goal or complete something
example: He achieved his ambition to become a doctor.

definition: To accept or admit the existence or truth of something
example: He acknowledged his mistake.

definition: Having or showing great energy or enthusiasm in pursuit of a cause or objective
example: She was a zealous supporter of environmental protection.
